message:
feat(fuzz): fuzz_function_restore target for FUNCTION LOAD/DUMP/RESTORE

Adds a structure-aware cargo-fuzz target covering the new atomic-
swap Store::function_restore path landed in the previous commit
("CLIENT TRACKING + CLIENT REPLY + FUNCTION RESTORE atomicity"), plus
the surrounding FUNCTION LOAD / FUNCTION DUMP payload handlers.

fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_function_restore.rs (new)
  * Tagged union via `arbitrary::Arbitrary`:
      - `ValidFunctionLibrary` — constructs a plausible library
        with up to MAX_FUNCTIONS=8 registered functions, each
        named under MAX_IDENT_LEN=32 bytes and using a
        `RegistrationStyle::{Call,Table}` discriminant that
        steers the generated Lua source through both the
        `redis.register_function(name, fn)` and the
        `redis.register_function{name=…, callback=…, flags=…}`
        surface shapes.
      - Raw fuzz input path under MAX_PAYLOAD_LEN=2_048 to drive
        hostile payloads into Store::function_restore.
  * Bounds: MAX_SOURCE_LEN=2_048 caps generated Lua source so
    each iteration stays cheap for libfuzzer.

fuzz/Cargo.toml
  * Register `[[bin]] fuzz_function_restore` pointing at the new
    target.

fuzz/corpus/fuzz_function_restore/ (new)
  * Starter corpus committed so the target has coverage from
    iteration one.

fuzz/README.md
  * Document the new target in the targets table and add a
    copy-pasteable `cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_function_restore`
    recipe.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -83,3 +83,10 @@ path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_acl_rules.rs"
 test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_function_restore"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_function_restore.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false

@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ This directory contains fuzz targets for security-critical parser surfaces.
 | `fuzz_rdb_decoder` | RDB file parsing | Crash detector |
 | `fuzz_dump_restore` | DUMP/RESTORE payload handling | Structure-aware round-trip + hostile payload invariants |
 | `fuzz_acl_rules` | ACL file parsing and canonicalization | Structure-aware round-trip + hostile text stabilization |
+| `fuzz_function_restore` | FUNCTION LOAD/DUMP/RESTORE handling | Structure-aware round-trip + hostile restore atomicity |
 
 ## Running Fuzz Tests
 
@@ -34,6 +35,9 @@ cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_dump_restore
 # Run ACL rule parser fuzzer
 cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_acl_rules
 
+# Run FUNCTION load/restore fuzzer
+cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_function_restore
+
 # Run round-trip invariant checker
 cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_resp_roundtrip
 ```

@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+0#!lua name=seedlib
+redis.register_function('alpha', function(keys, args) return #keys + #args end)
+redis.register_function{function_name='beta', callback=function(keys, args) return 0 end}
